artifacts.title: Example HR | Global Contractor Payments in 150+ Countries
artifacts.raw_text:
Product Pricing Customers Resources Login

Global contractor payments, minus the paperwork

Example HR helps fast-growing teams onboard and pay international contractors in 150+ countries. Localized contracts, automated invoicing, and payouts in 90 currencies — all compliant from day one.

Start paying contractors

Why teams choose Example HR

  • Compliant contractor agreements generated for each country
  • Batch payouts in 90 currencies with transparent FX
  • Tax form collection (W-8, W-9) handled automatically

Trusted by 2,000+ distributed teams

“We onboarded 40 contractors across 12 countries in our first week.” — Head of Ops, Northwind Labs

© 2024 Example HR, Inc.
